series.name: Golden Path Day 1
series.description: Default onboarding route: the core ByteCast episodes, the Day 1 training gate, and the practice handoff.

series.name: Sales Enablement
series.description: Offer framing, routing judgment, and the current sales practice surfaces.

series.name: Lumina Revenue Lane
series.description: Six Lumina revenue episodes followed by the routing capstone and seed brief handoff.

series.name: AV Apparel Onboarding
series.description: Three episodes for apparel culture, catalog work, and operating standards.

series.name: The Art Localized
series.description: Five-part collaboration and partnership training series.

series.name: Contributor Onboarding
series.description: Hub plus guided onboarding episodes for contributor expectations and readiness.

series.name: Infographic Training
series.description: Image-first overlay lesson pilots built from the infographic pack.

series.name: Shareholder Briefings
series.description: Pulse signal briefings (S1-EP-01 through S1-EP-06). Listed via data/pulse.json — not Day 1 onboarding.

series.name: Story + Context
series.description: Long-form origin and making-of surfaces that give the training lanes more context.

series.name: Reference + Tools
series.description: Supporting shells, docs, and reference training surfaces.

modules.name: Day 1 · Start Here
modules.description: Start the default learner route at EP-001 and move through the core ByteCast spine.

modules.name: TR-001A - Day 1 Foundations Check
modules.description: Day 1 check after EP-001 to EP-004: quiz, short written responses, and one routing scenario.

modules.name: TR-001 - Golden Path Missions (legacy)
modules.description: Earlier Golden Path mission set kept for reference.

modules.name: AeroVista Offer Pack App
modules.description: Division map, offers, and playbooks that help explain how AeroVista work is packaged.

modules.name: DispatchFlow Revenue Routing Lab
modules.description: Gameified sales mission for routing the right offer ladder: Training Hub entry, DispatchFlow primary, Visibility Layer upsell, or clean reroute.

modules.name: Revenue Engine Training
modules.description: Standalone visual sales training surface for the offer ladder, objections, and talking cards.

modules.name: Lumina Revenue Lane Start
modules.description: Start the Lumina revenue training sequence at EP-LUM-101 and run through EP-LUM-106.

modules.name: TR-LUM-001 - Revenue Routing Mission
modules.description: Lumina capstone mission: qualify the lead, recommend the right lane, and save a reviewer-approved result.

modules.name: SEED-LUM-001 - Lumina Sales Brief
modules.description: Seed page for packaging the Lumina sales brief and saving completion for the lane.

modules.name: AV Apparel Onboarding Start
modules.description: Start the apparel onboarding run covering culture, catalog contribution, and operations standards.

modules.name: The Art Localized Start
modules.description: Open the creative collaboration training lane at ART-EP-0 and continue through ART-EP-4.

modules.name: Contributor Onboarding Hub
modules.description: Hub page for the contributor lane with links, context, and supporting docs.

modules.name: Contributor Onboarding Episodes
modules.description: Start the contributor training episodes at CO-EP-0 and move through the full readiness sequence.

modules.name: AV Ecosystem Map Pilot
modules.description: Infographic-first pilot episode built from AV_AppEchosystemMap.png with overlay guidance and checkpoints.

modules.name: Shareholder Season 1 — Briefing Series
modules.description: Legacy root HTML briefing players for shareholder narrative. Distinct from Core Day 1 EP-001 through EP-004.

modules.name: S1-EP-01 — The AeroVista Universe
modules.description: Shareholder Season 1 orientation briefing — platform story and seven divisions.

modules.name: S1-EP-02 — Service Portfolio
modules.description: How AeroVista packages services and offers for the market.

modules.name: S1-EP-03 — Documented Ecosystem
modules.description: Documentation, governance, and ecosystem visibility for shareholders.

modules.name: S1-EP-04 — The Portable Ecosystem
modules.description: Portable ecosystem narrative — not Day 1 EP-004 Current Truth Basics.

modules.name: S1-EP-05 — Revenue & Growth Model
modules.description: Revenue and growth model briefing for shareholders.

modules.name: S1-EP-06 — The Roadmap Forward
modules.description: Forward roadmap and shareholder expectations for the next quarter.

modules.name: ByteCasts Making of AV
modules.description: Season-style context surface showing the making-of narrative behind the wider AeroVista training world.

modules.name: ByteCast AeroVista Story Site
modules.description: Long-form AeroVista story build for deeper platform narrative and chapter browsing.

modules.name: Lift Lab Training Site
modules.description: Guided training site with missions and step-by-step learning lanes.

modules.name: Docs Portal
modules.description: Reference library for standards, troubleshooting, and governed answers.
